case_title: INGRID ELEUTERIA DE LEON CHUN VS. VILMA LOAICIGA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LEON CHUN, INGRID ELEUTERIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-25-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DE LEON CHUN, INGRID ELEUTERIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOAICIGA, VILMA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2020 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT LOAICIGA, VILMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LEON CHUN, INGRID ELEUTERIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOAICIGA, VILMA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, DEFENDANT LANDLORD FAILED TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH ANY ACCOUNTING FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT AS TO CLEANING OR OTHER EXPENDITURES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF INGRID ELEUTERIA RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LEON CHUN, INGRID ELEUTERIA
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD. SENT TO PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY DE LEON CHUN, INGRID ELEUTERIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOAICIGA, VILMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETERS. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-21-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF INGRID ELEUTERIA DE LEON IS PRESENT. NO INTERPRETER IS AVAILABLE FOR THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BILMA LOAICIGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ASKED FOR AN INTERPRETER. NO INTERPRETER IS AVAILABLE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. COURT CLERK IS UNABLE TO ASK IF DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. BUT BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO COME BACK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LOAICIGA, VILMA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF INGRID ELEUTERIA DE LEON CHUN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER ANDREA POLLOCK. DEFENDANT VILMA LOAICIGA IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER DANIEL NAVARO. PARTIES AGREE TO MEDIATION. PARTIES RETURN TO COURT FOR HEARING AT 4:10 P.M. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
